metadata.description: Custom Claude Code skills for FARM stack development, open source contributions, repository maintenance, and portfolio management.

plugins.name: farm-stack
plugins.description: FARM stack (FastAPI + React + MongoDB) development patterns, scaffolding, and best practices.

plugins.name: oss-contrib
plugins.description: Open source contribution workflow -- upstream sync, CONTRIBUTING.md compliance, project-specific patterns.

plugins.name: repo-polish
plugins.description: Repository polishing -- .gitignore, .env.example, README, LICENSE generation and maintenance.

plugins.name: portfolio-updater
plugins.description: Portfolio data management -- scan repos, update projects.json, sync achievements and contributions.
